title: Children's In Home Respite Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Children's In Home Respite Care 9 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support through home visits, resource navigation, and respite child care for families in immediate need of help. Families involved in outreach also have access to other Relief Nursery services. 1720 W 25th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Low-income families with children age 6 and younger who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm (541) 343-9706 111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY ROBIN JAQUA CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support through home visits, resource navigation, and respite child care for families in immediate need of help. Families involved in outreach also have access to other Relief Nursery services. 850 S 42nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Low-income families with children age 6 and younger who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm (541) 343-9706 111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY DEVELOPMENT CENTER DOUGLAS COUNTY RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive family support programs, in-home support and counseling, crisis intervention, parent education classes and support groups, community resource and referrals, and play therapy for children. Offers classes for young children with trained teachers. 300 Jerry's Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 673-4354 Get Directions Visit Website 8am-5pm Therapeutic classes for ages 3-5: Monday/Tuesday 9am-noon Therapeutic classes for ages 24-42 months: Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon Email (971) 241-9258 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RISE, INC IN-HOME AND COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home services that support people with intellectual and developmental disabilities (I/DD). Services include: behavior support, hourly caregiving, and case coordination. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Children and adults with I/DD, mental health diagnoses, and backgrounds of abuse and neglect, and their families. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 371-3001 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UCP OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referral, support groups, social events, and some in-home respite care. Family events include picnics, zoo outings, special workshops, and a bi-annual conference. 96000 NE Cascades Parkway Suite 400 Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Families of children age 21 and younger who experience cerebral palsy or related disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 777-4166 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH FAMILY DEVELOPMENT CENTER DOUGLAS COUNTY RELIEF NURSERY LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER RISE, INC IN-HOME AND COMMUNITY SERVICES UCP OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES
